jtag_chain_ctrl

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x3bc
Size:
0x4
Source:
syscon_rf.rdl

Description

JTAG chain bypass control (1=bypassed/excluded from chain)

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
